action: Watchdog documentation: ADR 0008 + protocol doc + CLAUDE.md section + e2e test
operator_note: BLOCKED-BY: c33+c34+c35 all shipped (docs reflect final shipped behavior, not the plan). Scope (4 files, ~240 LoC, per doc-stewardship policy): (1) docs/architecture/phase-watchdog-protocol.md NEW ~100 LoC — detection mechanism, signal sources (.log mtime byte-cadence), threshold escalation 75%/100%, kill sequence SIGTERM→grace→SIGKILL on PGID, checkpoint/resume integration, multi-project isolation. (2) docs/adr/0008-activity-based-watchdog.md NEW ~60 LoC — rejected: per-phase static timeouts (stale + kills slow-but-progressing); rejected: default-off with opt-in promotion ladder (zero-cost-unless-fires argues default-on); accepted: dynamic activity-based default-on 240s. Citations: Temporal HeartbeatTimeout, Reflexion (Shinn 2023), Anthropic multi-agent research, flux-framework#3445 process-group requirement, AWS Step Functions Redrive. (3) CLAUDE.md +15 LoC add 'Stall Watchdog (v9.X+)' section as 3rd pillar under existing Checkpoint-Resume + Context-Window Control. (4) scripts/tests/stall-recovery-e2e-test.sh NEW ~80 LoC — SIGSTOP mid-build, assert rc=140 + worktree preserved + --resume picks up at build phase + warm hint delivered + cycle ships clean + .stalled.<ts> artifact preserved for forensics.
